global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with bold text elements promoting an exclusive offer.
global.main_message: Promoting an exclusive offer from StarVault.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background fills the canvas, providing a lively and energetic base for the ad.

elements.label: StarVault title
elements.description: The text 'StarVault' is prominently displayed in bold, large font at the top of the ad, conveying the brand name.

elements.label: Exclusive offer text
elements.description: The phrase 'Exclusive tonight' is presented in a medium-sized font, emphasizing urgency and exclusivity.

elements.label: Cancel anytime note
elements.description: A smaller text stating 'Cancel anytime' appears below the main offer, providing additional information in a subtle manner.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A bold, rounded button with the text 'Get offer' is located at the bottom, designed to attract clicks.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A small circular shape is placed in the background, adding visual interest without distracting from the main content.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape is positioned in the background, complementing the overall design and layout.

elements.label: Exclusive offer text
elements.description: The text 'Exclusive tonight Get offer' is prominently displayed at the bottom, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: StarVault branding
elements.description: The brand name 'StarVault' is featured at the top in a bold, eye-catching font, establishing brand identity.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, StarVault, exclusive offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text, and the CTA is at the bottom.
